description: Synthetic labelled entity-resolution oracle for the agentINVEST resolution capability. Each record is an inbound legal-entity record from one of three named source systems (custodian, administrator, internal_onboarding), labelled with its TRUE canonical E-01 entity_id (or NEW / AMBIGUOUS) and the difficulty tier it exercises. The labels are derived from the INJECTION INTENT used to construct raw_entity_resolution_feed.csv (never read back from the feed strings) — the oracle-integrity discipline. This manifest is the ZERO-MIS-MERGE ground truth: a mis-merge (two distinct true entities merged) is the cardinal sin; the genuinely-ambiguous pairs MUST land in the steward review queue, never force-merged.

tiers.exact_lei: exact external-identifier (LEI) match via E-14 — Tier-1
tiers.alias_match: E-13 alias / normalised-name match with no inbound LEI — Tier-2
tiers.name_variant_no_id: a realistic private-company name with NO universal identifier and NO internal key in the surface string, resolved via the E-13 alias machinery + domicile/parent corroboration (the model's hard case) — Tier-2
tiers.ambiguous: net-new OR genuinely-ambiguous (conflicting metadata, no ID) — Tier-3 review queue; must NOT auto-merge
